# jellyfin_plugin_repositories (Data Source)

Lists all configured Jellyfin plugin repositories.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_plugin_repositories" "all" {}

output "repository_names" {
  value = [for r in data.jellyfin_plugin_repositories.all.repositories : r.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `repositories` (Attributes List) The list of plugin repositories. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories))

<a id="nestedatt--repositories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the repository is enabled.
- `name` (String) The repository name.
- `url` (String) The repository URL.
